summary.description: 1-3 sentence operator-voice summary of what the meeting was actually about and what changed because of it. Not a topic list.

attendees_present.description: Full names of people who actually spoke or were explicitly addressed in the transcript. Do not include anyone only mentioned in passing.

speaker_resolution_confidence.description: high = every speaker's name is in the transcript text. partial = some speakers identified, others ambiguous. low = many unknowns.

discussion.description: 2-4 sentences capturing what was actually said and concluded on this topic. Operator voice.

decision.description: What was decided, stated in one clear sentence.

made_by.description: Person who made or confirmed the decision.

durability.description: durable = a policy/strategy decision worth a standalone atlas/decisions note. routine = inline meeting-note decision.

description.description: What needs to be done, one sentence imperative.

owner.description: Person responsible. Use the full name from attendees_present.

owner_category.description: operator = the operator themselves. team = a member of the operator's own team. client_team = the client's employees. client_client = the client's clients (end customers, prospects). Routes the action: only operator (and team items flagged blocks_operator) reach the operator's GTD surface; all others stay inline on the meeting note.

blocks_operator.description: Only meaningful when owner_category=team. True if this delegated action is a hard blocker on the operator's own forward progress (they cannot proceed until it's done). Default false — most delegated work does NOT block the operator and should not enter their GTD.

due.description: Due date if stated, empty string otherwise. ISO format if possible.

why_quotable.description: Why this line stands out — stand-alone insight, sharp framing, durable lesson.

key_quotes.description: Only stand-alone quotes worth saving. Empty array if none.

observation.description: Substantive context about this person that would update their atlas/people note. Skip routine context.

open_questions.description: Unresolved questions from the meeting that the operator should follow up on.

sensitive.description: true if the meeting touched on confidential topics (compensation, terminations, legal, personal health, etc.)
